verdict: NOT-ZERO-GAPS — semantic closure is incomplete; branch cut is BLOCKED. 25 capabilities require V1 completion, 10 deprecated zero-consumer packages await delete-after-proof execution, and the config-runtime package fate is an open decision. Zero gaps may only be claimed when `npm run v2:readiness` exits 0.

semanticGapsRemaining.note: Capabilities not delivered-and-proven that need design/build/extension before the cut, plus the config-runtime package-fate decision. NOT hidden inside any delivered count.

ADR-ACT-0261 — Tempo tracing, Grafana datasource wiring and browser→BFF tracing are DELIVERED (ADR-0074). Remaining: application metrics exported/queryable via Prometheus + curated dashboards (split: V1C-17a metrics, V1C-17b dashboards; Alertmanager/on-call/status-page are V1C-19-adjacent ops, tracked separately). [V1 completion]

ADR-ACT-0247 — `make quality` already hard-runs `npm audit` + OSV. Remaining genuine gate gap: CodeQL as authoritative SAST + SBOM freshness/policy validation + gitleaks availability fail-closed in authoritative environments + dependency-scan evidence. (Renamed: 'Authoritative security-scan gate hardening'.) [V1 completion]

openDecisions.subject: packages/config-runtime
openDecisions.decision: Decide typed composition-root config object (validation + secret handling) THEN keep config-runtime canonical (deprecated status removed + proof) or remove it. ADR-ACT-0289 explicitly deferred this; scattered process.env reads are NOT canonical.

executionOnlyActionsRemaining.note: Zero discovery; mechanical execution of resolved dispositions.

deleteAfterProof.gatedBy: orchestrator strict zero-consumer proof (ADR-0006/ADR-ACT-0289); removal review 2026-12-18

branchCutBlockers.note: Must all close before §1 of v2-branch-cut-runbook.md; the validator (tools/v2-readiness) fails closed while any remain.
